docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $850.00 FILED BY HERRERA, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT RIOS, ALBERT DBA AREA FIREARMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-27-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
